items.title: Feature: Officer / General View event from unit monitor
Feature: Make a tab to view both the event and unit monitor side by side.
Hamlet not showing under location on unit monitor. Perhaps the common name should too?
None
items.description: Reporter: Testing Cad System Bug Report

items.title: Memo Print
items.description: When printing the memo book, the officer name should be displayed on the print out

items.title: Multiple Units
items.description: If multiple units are signed in as the same callsign (for example 2 201's) dont allow it, allow the officer who is signing in to kick the other 201 off, but give them an option in case they forgot to sign out.

items.title: Force Unit Signoff - Memo Book
items.description: If we force a unit to sign off, and they dont complete their memo book, make it so that a supervisor knows its incomplete in the review tab, and allow the officer to complete it next time they sign in.

items.title: Add Email Server
items.description: Add email server for email reports, daily reports, new users creations, password reset, send a email to the user when the account is first created to setup a password, etc.

items.title: Audit log showing 127.0.0.1
items.description: Also we need to update the audit logs to update with all the new stuff we added. As well as the ip of the user in the audit log is [localhost](http://localhost/) (127.0.0.1)

items.title: Memo book force logoff
items.description: If we force a unit to sign off, and they dont complete their memo book, make it so that a supervisor knows its incomplete in the review tab, and allow the officer to complete it next time they sign in.

comments.author: ryanpfister
comments.body: This issue has been completed / fixed.

items.title: Needs assistance
items.description: If someone's status is changed to "need assistance (10-1), maybe an alert tone to all units and dispatch

comments.author: ryanpfister
comments.body: This should be implemented see commit origin/claude/brookhaven-cad-system-NK6yM

items.title: Pop up notification
items.description: Pop up notification with sound for assigned calls to any officer assigned

comments.author: ryanpfister
comments.body: This issue has been fixed / implemented.

items.title: Create noted with status's
items.description:
General -
Add the ability to create notes with statuses, mainly when not assigned to a call, so if someone says they are on a personal or taking a 12 (return to town hall) per 104, you can put "PER 104" and its visible on the unit monitor.

comments.author: ryanpfister
comments.body: This has been complete with commit claude/brookhaven-cad-system-NK6yM

items.title: Change Status
items.description:
General-
Change statuses to Available (green), assigned or dispatched (yellow), enroute (blue), on scene (orange), unavailable (white), 10-18 (meal) (teal), 10-12 (returning to town hall) (brown), out of service (purple), and needs assistance (red)

comments.author: ryanpfister
comments.body:
This has been added to the project.

The commit brookhaven-cad-system-NK6yM solved this issue
